# Dealix Learning Loop

```
Project → Delivery → QA → Proof → Review → Asset → Playbook → Feature → Better next project
```

## Closure gate

Every engagement must produce **`POST_PROJECT_REVIEW.md`** (from `projects/<client>/<project>/` or copy from `projects/_TEMPLATE/`).

If it is empty or missing, the project is **not closed internally** — even if the client signed off.
